welcome: 🌹 Welcome to Asal Boutique Hotel! We are located in the heart of Bukhara — one of the oldest cities in the world. Choose language / Выберите язык:
main_menu: 🏨 Asal Boutique Hotel How can I help you?
about_text: 🏨 Asal Boutique Hotel 📍 Samarkand St 86, Bukhara 📞 +998 78 333 22 00 📷 @asal_boutique_hotel 🌟 Boutique hotel in the historic center of Bukhara with 80 cozy rooms. At our hotel: • 3 room types (Standard, Deluxe, Suite) • Uzbek cuisine restaurant • Pool and SPA • Free Wi-Fi • Airport transfer • Bukhara tours
contacts_text: 📞 Contacts 📱 WhatsApp: +998 78 333 22 00 📞 Phone: +998 78 333 22 00 📧 Email: info@asal-hotel.uz 📷 Instagram: @asal_boutique_hotel 🌐 Website: www.asal-hotel.uz ⏰ Reception is open 24/7
promotions_text: 🎁 Current Promotions 🌟 Early Booking Book 30+ days in advance — 10% off 🌙 Long Stay 7+ nights — 15% off 👨‍👩‍👧 Family Package Children under 6 — free 💎 Asal Friends Loyalty Program Accumulate nights and get up to 10% discount
